caption: A man with white hair and a beard, wearing a cream-colored Nehru jacket over a light-colored shirt, stands behind a dark brown wooden podium. He is speaking in front of a textured green marble wall decorated with geometric patterns and flanked by vertical golden pillars accented with small pink flowers. Two microphones are mounted on the podium. As the sequence progresses, the man gestures with his hands to emphasize his speech. Initially, he holds both arms out wide with open palms. He then brings his arms closer to his body, eventually gesturing with his right hand while his left hand moves inward toward his chest. His facial expression remains focused and engaged throughout the clip. There is no on-screen text or logos visible in the scene.
